canonical_name: Yeshasvini Co-operative Farmers Health Care Scheme (Karnataka)

income_thresholds.description: No income threshold — eligibility is based on cooperative society membership, not income. Members pay annual premium: Rs 500/yr (rural) or Rs 1000/yr (urban).
income_thresholds.source: Yeshasvini Cooperative Farmers Health Care Trust / Karnataka Government

exclusion_rules.description: ONLY registered cooperative society members and their families are eligible. Non-members are excluded regardless of income or occupation.
Members above 75 years of age are excluded from coverage
Annual enrollment window is May-June only; late enrollment not accepted outside this period
Members who have not paid the annual premium (Rs 500 rural / Rs 1000 urban) are excluded
Treatment is covered ONLY at Yeshasvini-empanelled hospitals within Karnataka; out-of-state treatment not covered

family_criteria.family_definition: Cooperative society member plus their family members. Each family member must be separately enrolled and premium paid. Age 0-75 years only.

covered_procedures: Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery, fracture fixation)
Neurosurgery (brain tumor, craniotomy, spinal cord procedures)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization
excluded_procedures: Medical management (non-surgical hospitalization for most conditions)
Pre-existing chronic disease management (dialysis excluded after initial coverage)

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for identity verification at empanelled hospital

required_documents.name: Cooperative Society Membership Certificate
required_documents.notes: Must be a registered member of a cooperative society in Karnataka (farmer, weaver, fisherman, dairy, etc.). This is the PRIMARY eligibility document.

required_documents.name: Yeshasvini Premium Payment Receipt
required_documents.notes: Proof of annual premium payment: Rs 500/year for rural members, Rs 1000/year for urban members. Paid via cooperative society.

required_documents.name: Yeshasvini Health Card
alternatives: Cooperative membership + premium receipt at hospital
required_documents.notes: Issued after enrollment and premium payment; present at hospital for cashless treatment

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP verification and scheme notifications

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Ensure membership in a registered cooperative society in Karnataka (farmer, weaver, fisherman, dairy, etc.)
Step 2: During annual enrollment period (May-June), visit your cooperative society office
Step 3: Pay annual premium: Rs 500 for rural members or Rs 1000 for urban members
Step 4: Provide Aadhaar, cooperative membership certificate, and family member details
Step 5: Cooperative society submits enrollment to Yeshasvini Trust with premium collection
Step 6: Yeshasvini Health Card issued with member and family details
Step 7: For treatment, visit any Yeshasvini-empanelled hospital in Karnataka with card and Aadhaar for cashless surgical treatment
description_for_embedding: Yeshasvini Co-operative Farmers Health Care Scheme is Karnataka's unique health insurance scheme exclusively for registered cooperative society members and their families. It provides Rs 5 lakh (Rs 500000) per family per year covering 823 surgical procedures at empanelled hospitals within Karnataka ONLY. Eligibility is based on cooperative society membership (farmers, weavers, fishermen, dairy workers, etc.) not income. Members pay a nominal annual premium of Rs 500 (rural) or Rs 1000 (urban). Enrollment window is May-June annually. Age limit is 0-75 years. Treatment is limited to Karnataka hospitals only. One of India's first and largest cooperative health insurance schemes, covering over 40 lakh members. Not linked to PM-JAY.
